# Deeply Nested Structures

> Level 1
>> Level 2
>>> Level 3
>>>> Level 4
>>>>> Level 5
>>>>>> Level 6

- Item 1
  - Item 1.1
    - Item 1.1.1
      - Item 1.1.1.1
        - Item 1.1.1.1.1
          - Item 1.1.1.1.1.1

1. First
   1. Nested first
      1. Double nested first
         1. Triple nested first
            1. Quad nested first

> Blockquote with:
>
> - A list
>   - Nested list
>     - With **bold** and *italic*
>     - And `code`
>
> > And a nested blockquote
> > > With three levels
> > > > Four levels
